ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joel Blackman for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

Mr. Blackman reported that the estate has had $119,357.00 since the SFPA received it, that there have been no expenses and no income except bank interest, that the SFPA has done everything it could to try and find the heirs, that they could turn this over to an heir finders company or they can escheat it to the state. The Court stated that the SFPA can seek instructions/relief to close out the estate. Mr. Blackman stated that they will petition to distribute. The Court stated that regarding the accounting, as long as there is nothing further to be done it will approve the first accounting and grant permission to do a single final accounting al long as it is complete by 2017.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
